prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-CMHN-ONE-CM Product Type: APPAREL_HEAD_NECK_COVERING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Full Face Mosquito Head Net, Insect Repellant Bug Hat for Camping, One Size Fits All Description: This mosquito net is great for any group outing, or if you just want to make sure you have bug defense at the ready. Keep one with your garden tools, in your tackle box, with picnicking supplies, and in your hiking backpack. Its strong netting ensures defense against annoying mosquitoes.

Camo fabric and an elastic neck closure make this set great for all occasions. The lightweight construction and camouflage fabric make this a versatile head net ideal for keeping those pesky bugs away from your face. Search Terms: camping gear bug bracelet wearable braclet accessories wrist band kid mosquito deet insect repellent repelling deterrent wristband anklet citronella hiking supplies essentials Features: - UNIVERSAL UNISEX FIT: One size fits most all; non gender specific insect repellant garment - OVERALL SIZE SPECIFICATIONS: 16 inches x 6.25 inches; Neck Length: 8 inches; Comfortable and breathable while fully protected - TRUST AND SAFETY: How did you get yourself here; you need a bug net that works; this fully enclosed insect repellant garment features a elastic drawstring neck that keeps bugs OUT - PROVEN RESULTS IN THE FIELD: Coming off a long winter; the spring thaw can give way to extreme insect conditions, this insect bug head net will keep your site on trail while repelling insects by not letting them in - LIGHTWEIGHT AND BREATHABLE: You got yourself into this place, better make the most of it and it starts with having the right outdoor gear in your pack === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 80 characters. Please include the size and color of the item in the Product Name, if available. === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Camo Full Face Mosquito Head Net

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Full Face Mosquito Head Net

anthropic.title_differentiation: One Size Fits All, Elastic Neck Closure, Lightweight Breathable, Bug Defense, Camping Hiking Gear

openai.title_differentiation: One Size Fits Most, Elastic Drawstring Neck, Lightweight Breathable Camo, Bug Defense For Camping Hiking
